group.description: Which sidebar group this report belongs to

base_page.description: Which built-in report layout this is based on (performance_overview, daily, campaign, pnl, ad, buyer, supplier)

pinned_filters.description: JSON object of pinned filter values e.g. {"buyer_id":"AG1"}

cards.description: JSON array of metric card configs {id, metric, x, y, w, h}

widgets.description: JSON array of widget configs {id, type, w, columns, settings}

extra_columns.description: JSON array of custom field names added as columns
